title: Industry Leaders Engage in ISSB-Aligned Disclosure Training - FinancialEDGE
description: Industry leaders participated in a technical training program focused on enhancing understanding of the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB) requirements. The event was organized in collaboration with prominent Nigerian regulatory bodies and professional services firms, including the Financial Reporting Council of Nigeria (FRCN), the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), NGX Regulation Limited (NGX RegCo), and
html:
Industry  leaders participated in a technical training program focused on enhancing understanding of the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB) requirements.

The event was organized in collaboration with prominent Nigerian regulatory bodies and professional services firms, including the Financial Reporting Council of Nigeria (FRCN), the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), NGX Regulation Limited (NGX RegCo), and EY.

Yemi Ogundipe Managing Director Omatek Plc, Odume Festus,  Editorial/Project Director Financial Edge and lateef of Presco Plc, actively involved in financial and sustainability discussions.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Yemi Ogundipe Managing Director Omatek Plc, Odume Festus,  Editorial/Project Director Financial Edge and lateef of Presco Plc.
